{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Customer Service Executive",
  "description": "DynamicPlus Advisory is a professional consultancy that provides strategic and cost effective business solutions to start-ups as well as small and medium sized businesses by Studying their businesses, understanding their individual needs, and providing them with the necessary customized solutions to their Human Resources needs.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Customer Service Executive

Job Location:&nbsp;Ojodu-Berger, Lagos&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	The Customer Service Executive is responsible for delivering a seamless, responsive, and premium client experience across event services and d&eacute;cor rentals. The role manages client inquiries, coordinates bookings, and ensures smooth handling of rental items from reservation to return, while maintaining the brand&rsquo;s high service standards.


Key Responsibilities
Client Communication &amp; Inquiry Management:


	Serve as the first point of contact for all inquiries (calls, WhatsApp, email, Instagram, etc.)
	Respond promptly with clear, professional, and well-structured information
	Provide detailed guidance on event services and available d&eacute;cor rental items
	Maintain a polished, luxury brand tone in all interactions.


D&eacute;cor Rental Coordination:


	Attend to all decor inquiries, share brochure as required
	Attend to rental inquiries, including item availability, pricing, and packages
	Check and confirm availability with the inventory/warehouse team before booking
	Process rental bookings, ensuring accurate documentation of items, quantities, and dates
	Clearly communicate rental terms (duration, handling, damages, return timelines, etc.)
	Coordinate pickup, delivery, and return schedules with clients and logistics team
	Confirm condition of items upon return and report any damages or discrepancies.


Client Experience Management (Events &amp; Rentals):


	Guide clients through the full journey&mdash;from inquiry to post-event/rental completion
	Ensure clarity on timelines, deliverables, and expectations
	Provide proactive updates and follow-ups to clients
	Ensure a smooth and stress-free experience for both event and rental clients.


Internal Coordination:


	Liaise with design, operations, and warehouse teams to fulfill client requests
	Ensure all client briefs (event or rental) are properly documented and executed
	Track all bookings and ensure alignment across teams.


Issue Resolution:


	Handle complaints, last-minute changes, or rental-related concerns professionally
	Resolve issues quickly or escalate when necessary
	Manage sensitive situations such as damaged or delayed returns with tact and professionalism.


Documentation &amp; Record Keeping:


	Maintain accurate records of client interactions, bookings, and rental agreements
	Track rental schedules (outgoing and incoming items)
	Ensure proper documentation of approvals, invoices, and confirmations.


Post-Service Engagement:


	Follow up with clients after events or rentals to gather feedback
	Encourage reviews, testimonials, and repeat business
	Maintain relationships with returning rental clients (e.g., planners, decorators, brides).


Key Requirements
Education &amp; Experience:


	OND / HND / Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Mass Communication, Business Administration, or related fields
	1 - 3 years of experience in customer service (events, hospitality, or rental business is an advantage).


Skills &amp; Competencies:


	Excellent communication and client-handling skills
	Strong organizational and coordination ability
	Attention to detail (critical for rental tracking and bookings)
	Ability to multitask and manage multiple clients simultaneously
	Problem-solving and conflict resolution skills
	Basic proficiency in Microsoft Excel or booking/inventory systems.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their&nbsp;detailed CV as an attachment to:&nbsp;cvs@dynamicplusservices.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note: Shortlisted candidates will be contacted.",

Customer Service Executive Job at DynamicPlus Advisory




        
    

        
        DynamicPlus Advisory is a professional consultancy that provides strategic and cost effective business solutions to start-ups as well as small and medium sized businesses by Studying their businesses, understanding their individual needs, and providing them with the necessary customized solutions to their Human Resources needs.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Customer Service Executive

Job Location: Ojodu-Berger, Lagos 
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The Customer Service Executive is responsible for delivering a seamless, responsive, and premium client experience across event services and décor rentals. The role manages client inquiries, coordinates bookings, and ensures smooth handling of rental items from reservation to return, while maintaining the brand’s high service standards.


Key Responsibilities
Client Communication & Inquiry Management:


	Serve as the first point of contact for all inquiries (calls, WhatsApp, email, Instagram, etc.)
	Respond promptly with clear, professional, and well-structured information
	Provide detailed guidance on event services and available décor rental items
	Maintain a polished, luxury brand tone in all interactions.


Décor Rental Coordination:


	Attend to all decor inquiries, share brochure as required
	Attend to rental inquiries, including item availability, pricing, and packages
	Check and confirm availability with the inventory/warehouse team before booking
	Process rental bookings, ensuring accurate documentation of items, quantities, and dates
	Clearly communicate rental terms (duration, handling, damages, return timelines, etc.)
	Coordinate pickup, delivery, and return schedules with clients and logistics team
	Confirm condition of items upon return and report any damages or discrepancies.


Client Experience Management (Events & Rentals):


	Guide clients through the full journey—from inquiry to post-event/rental completion
	Ensure clarity on timelines, deliverables, and expectations
	Provide proactive updates and follow-ups to clients
	Ensure a smooth and stress-free experience for both event and rental clients.


Internal Coordination:


	Liaise with design, operations, and warehouse teams to fulfill client requests
	Ensure all client briefs (event or rental) are properly documented and executed
	Track all bookings and ensure alignment across teams.


Issue Resolution:


	Handle complaints, last-minute changes, or rental-related concerns professionally
	Resolve issues quickly or escalate when necessary
	Manage sensitive situations such as damaged or delayed returns with tact and professionalism.


Documentation & Record Keeping:


	Maintain accurate records of client interactions, bookings, and rental agreements
	Track rental schedules (outgoing and incoming items)
	Ensure proper documentation of approvals, invoices, and confirmations.


Post-Service Engagement:


	Follow up with clients after events or rentals to gather feedback
	Encourage reviews, testimonials, and repeat business
	Maintain relationships with returning rental clients (e.g., planners, decorators, brides).


Key Requirements
Education & Experience:


	OND / HND / Bachelor’s Degree in Mass Communication, Business Administration, or related fields
	1 - 3 years of experience in customer service (events, hospitality, or rental business is an advantage).


Skills & Competencies:


	Excellent communication and client-handling skills
	Strong organizational and coordination ability
	Attention to detail (critical for rental tracking and bookings)
	Ability to multitask and manage multiple clients simultaneously
	Problem-solving and conflict resolution skills
	Basic proficiency in Microsoft Excel or booking/inventory systems.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their detailed CV as an attachment to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note: Shortlisted candidates will be contacted.    

    

        Click here to Apply

title: Job Openings at DynamicPlus Advisory
content:
DynamicPlus Advisory is a professional consultancy that provides strategic and cost effective business solutions to start-ups as well as small and medium sized businesses by Studying their businesses, understanding their individual needs, and providing them with the necessary customized solutions to their Human Resources needs.

We are recruiting to fill the following positions below:

1.) Account and Administrative Officer

Job Location: Ojodu-Berger, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The Account / Administrative Officer is responsible for supporting the company’s financial operations while ensuring smooth day-to-day administrative activities.
	This role combines basic accounting duties with office coordination, helping maintain accurate financial records and an efficient workplace.


Key Responsibilities
Accounting Duties;


	Record daily financial transactions (income, expenses, payments)
	Maintain accurate bookkeeping records and update accounting software
	Assist with invoicing clients and tracking payments
	Prepare and process receipts, purchase orders, and expense reports
	Monitor petty cash and reconcile discrepancies
	Support monthly bank reconciliations
	Assist in preparing basic financial reports (cash flow, income summaries)
	Follow up on outstanding payments from clients
	Support external auditors or accountants when required


Administrative Duties:


	Manage office supplies and inventory (including decor items, if applicable)
	Maintain proper filing systems (physical and digital)
	Handle correspondence (emails, calls, letters)
	Schedule meetings and manage calendars
	Assist with staff documentation and records
	Coordinate logistics for office and event operations
	Support procurement and vendor communication
	Ensure general office organization and cleanliness.


Qualifications & Requirements


	HND/BSc in Accounting, Finance, Business Administration, or related field
	1–3 years of experience in a similar role (preferred)
	Basic knowledge of accounting principles
	Proficiency in Microsoft Excel and accounting software (e.g., QuickBooks, Sage)
	Strong organizational and multitasking skills
	Good written and verbal communication skills
	High level of integrity and attention to detail.


Key Skills & Competencies:


	Accuracy and attention to detail
	Time management and ability to meet deadlines
	Confidentiality and trustworthiness
	Problem-solving ability
	Ability to work with minimal supervision
	Strong interpersonal skills.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their detailed CV as an attachment to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note: Shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

 

2.) Warehouse Officer

Job Location: Ojodu-Berger, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	The Inventory & Warehouse Officer is responsible for the efficient management, control, and movement of all event décor assets, equipment, and consumables.
	This role ensures that inventory is accurately tracked, properly stored, well-maintained, and readily available for events, while minimizing loss, damage, or stock discrepancies.


Key Responsibilities
Inventory Management:


	Maintain accurate records of all inventory (props, furniture, fabrics, lighting, décor items, tools, etc.)
	Implement and manage an inventory tracking system (manual or digital)
	Conduct regular stock counts (weekly/monthly) and reconcile discrepancies
	Monitor stock levels and notify management of shortages or replenishment needs


Warehouse Operations:


	Organize and maintain a clean, safe, and efficient warehouse space
	Ensure proper labeling, categorization, and storage of all items
	Supervise loading and offloading of items for events
	Ensure items are packed securely to prevent damage during transportation


Event Logistics Support:


	Prepare and dispatch inventory for events based on event briefs
	Cross-check items returned from events to ensure completeness and condition
	Report damages, losses, or missing items immediately
	Work closely with the design and operations team to fulfill event requirements


Asset Maintenance:


	Track condition of all inventory and schedule repairs or replacements
	Ensure delicate or high-value items are handled with extra care
	Maintain a log of damaged, repaired, or retired items


Documentation & Reporting:


	Maintain proper documentation for inventory movement (check-in/check-out logs)
	Generate periodic inventory reports for management review
	Support audit processes when required


Team Coordination:


	Supervise warehouse assistants and casual staff when required
	Collaborate with procurement, operations, and design teams


Key Requirements
Education & Experience:


	Minimum of OND / HND / Bachelor’s Degree in Logistics, Supply Chain, Business Administration, or related fields
	2 - 4 years of experience in inventory, warehouse, or logistics management (event industry experience is a strong advantage).


Skills & Competencies:


	Strong organizational and record-keeping skills
	Attention to detail and accuracy
	Basic knowledge of inventory software or Excel
	Good communication and teamwork skills
	Ability to work under pressure, especially during event periods
	Problem-solving mindset.


Behavioral Expectations:


	High level of integrity and accountability
	Proactive and dependable
	Respect for company assets and processes
	Strong sense of ownership.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their detailed CV as an attachment to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note: Shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

 

 

3.) Customer Service Executive

Job Location: Ojodu-Berger, Lagos 
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	The Customer Service Executive is responsible for delivering a seamless, responsive, and premium client experience across event services and décor rentals. The role manages client inquiries, coordinates bookings, and ensures smooth handling of rental items from reservation to return, while maintaining the brand’s high service standards.


Key Responsibilities
Client Communication & Inquiry Management:


	Serve as the first point of contact for all inquiries (calls, WhatsApp, email, Instagram, etc.)
	Respond promptly with clear, professional, and well-structured information
	Provide detailed guidance on event services and available décor rental items
	Maintain a polished, luxury brand tone in all interactions.


Décor Rental Coordination:


	Attend to all decor inquiries, share brochure as required
	Attend to rental inquiries, including item availability, pricing, and packages
	Check and confirm availability with the inventory/warehouse team before booking
	Process rental bookings, ensuring accurate documentation of items, quantities, and dates
	Clearly communicate rental terms (duration, handling, damages, return timelines, etc.)
	Coordinate pickup, delivery, and return schedules with clients and logistics team
	Confirm condition of items upon return and report any damages or discrepancies.


Client Experience Management (Events & Rentals):


	Guide clients through the full journey—from inquiry to post-event/rental completion
	Ensure clarity on timelines, deliverables, and expectations
	Provide proactive updates and follow-ups to clients
	Ensure a smooth and stress-free experience for both event and rental clients.


Internal Coordination:


	Liaise with design, operations, and warehouse teams to fulfill client requests
	Ensure all client briefs (event or rental) are properly documented and executed
	Track all bookings and ensure alignment across teams.


Issue Resolution:


	Handle complaints, last-minute changes, or rental-related concerns professionally
	Resolve issues quickly or escalate when necessary
	Manage sensitive situations such as damaged or delayed returns with tact and professionalism.


Documentation & Record Keeping:


	Maintain accurate records of client interactions, bookings, and rental agreements
	Track rental schedules (outgoing and incoming items)
	Ensure proper documentation of approvals, invoices, and confirmations.


Post-Service Engagement:


	Follow up with clients after events or rentals to gather feedback
	Encourage reviews, testimonials, and repeat business
	Maintain relationships with returning rental clients (e.g., planners, decorators, brides).


Key Requirements
Education & Experience:


	OND / HND / Bachelor’s Degree in Mass Communication, Business Administration, or related fields
	1 - 3 years of experience in customer service (events, hospitality, or rental business is an advantage).


Skills & Competencies:


	Excellent communication and client-handling skills
	Strong organizational and coordination ability
	Attention to detail (critical for rental tracking and bookings)
	Ability to multitask and manage multiple clients simultaneously
	Problem-solving and conflict resolution skills
	Basic proficiency in Microsoft Excel or booking/inventory systems.


Application Closing Date: 26th April, 2026.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their detailed CV as an attachment to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note: Shortlisted candidates will be contacted.    

    

        Click here to Apply

	Clearly communicate rental terms (duration, handling, damages, return timelines, etc.)
	Coordinate pickup, delivery, and return schedules with clients and logistics team
	Confirm condition of items upon return and report any damages or discrepancies.


Client Experience Management (Events &amp; Rentals):


	Guide clients through the full journey&mdash;from inquiry to post-event/rental completion
	Ensure clarity on timelines, deliverables, and expectations
	Provide proactive updates and follow-ups to clients
	Ensure a smooth and stress-free experience for both event and rental clients.


Internal Coordination:


	Liaise with design, operations, and warehouse teams to fulfill client requests
	Ensure all client briefs (event or rental) are properly documented and executed
	Track all bookings and ensure alignment across teams.


Issue Resolution:


	Handle complaints, last-minute changes, or rental-related concerns professionally
	Resolve issues quickly or escalate when necessary
	Manage sensitive situations such as damaged or delayed returns with tact and professionalism.


Documentation &amp; Record Keeping:


	Maintain accurate records of client interactions, bookings, and rental agreements
	Track rental schedules (outgoing and incoming items)
	Ensure proper documentation of approvals, invoices, and confirmations.


Post-Service Engagement:


	Follow up with clients after events or rentals to gather feedback
	Encourage reviews, testimonials, and repeat business
	Maintain relationships with returning rental clients (e.g., planners, decorators, brides).


Key Requirements
Education &amp; Experience:


	OND / HND / Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Mass Communication, Business Administration, or related fields
	1 - 3 years of experience in customer service (events, hospitality, or rental business is an advantage).


Skills &amp; Competencies:


	Excellent communication and client-handling skills
	Strong organizational and coordination ability
	Attention to detail (critical for rental tracking and bookings)
	Ability to multitask and manage multiple clients simultaneously
	Problem-solving and conflict resolution skills
	Basic proficiency in Microsoft Excel or booking/inventory systems.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their&nbsp;detailed CV as an attachment to:&nbsp;cvs@dynamicplusservices.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note: Shortlisted candidates will be contacted.",

Customer Service Executive Job at DynamicPlus Advisory




        
    

        
        DynamicPlus Advisory is a professional consultancy that provides strategic and cost effective business solutions to start-ups as well as small and medium sized businesses by Studying their businesses, understanding their individual needs, and providing them with the necessary customized solutions to their Human Resources needs.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Customer Service Executive

Job Location: Ojodu-Berger, Lagos 
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The Customer Service Executive is responsible for delivering a seamless, responsive, and premium client experience across event services and décor rentals. The role manages client inquiries, coordinates bookings, and ensures smooth handling of rental items from reservation to return, while maintaining the brand’s high service standards.


Key Responsibilities
Client Communication & Inquiry Management:


	Serve as the first point of contact for all inquiries (calls, WhatsApp, email, Instagram, etc.)
	Respond promptly with clear, professional, and well-structured information
	Provide detailed guidance on event services and available décor rental items
	Maintain a polished, luxury brand tone in all interactions.


Décor Rental Coordination:


	Attend to all decor inquiries, share brochure as required
	Attend to rental inquiries, including item availability, pricing, and packages
	Check and confirm availability with the inventory/warehouse team before booking
	Process rental bookings, ensuring accurate documentation of items, quantities, and dates
	Clearly communicate rental terms (duration, handling, damages, return timelines, etc.)
	Coordinate pickup, delivery, and return schedules with clients and logistics team
	Confirm condition of items upon return and report any damages or discrepancies.


Client Experience Management (Events & Rentals):


	Guide clients through the full journey—from inquiry to post-event/rental completion
	Ensure clarity on timelines, deliverables, and expectations
	Provide proactive updates and follow-ups to clients
	Ensure a smooth and stress-free experience for both event and rental clients.


Internal Coordination:


	Liaise with design, operations, and warehouse teams to fulfill client requests
	Ensure all client briefs (event or rental) are properly documented and executed
	Track all bookings and ensure alignment across teams.


Issue Resolution:


	Handle complaints, last-minute changes, or rental-related concerns professionally
	Resolve issues quickly or escalate when necessary
	Manage sensitive situations such as damaged or delayed returns with tact and professionalism.


Documentation & Record Keeping:


	Maintain accurate records of client interactions, bookings, and rental agreements
	Track rental schedules (outgoing and incoming items)
	Ensure proper documentation of approvals, invoices, and confirmations.


Post-Service Engagement:


	Follow up with clients after events or rentals to gather feedback
	Encourage reviews, testimonials, and repeat business
	Maintain relationships with returning rental clients (e.g., planners, decorators, brides).


Key Requirements
Education & Experience:


	OND / HND / Bachelor’s Degree in Mass Communication, Business Administration, or related fields
	1 - 3 years of experience in customer service (events, hospitality, or rental business is an advantage).


Skills & Competencies:


	Excellent communication and client-handling skills
	Strong organizational and coordination ability
	Attention to detail (critical for rental tracking and bookings)
	Ability to multitask and manage multiple clients simultaneously
	Problem-solving and conflict resolution skills
	Basic proficiency in Microsoft Excel or booking/inventory systems.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their detailed CV as an attachment to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note: Shortlisted candidates will be contacted.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Logistics Manager",
  "description": "GKT Car Rentals is a contemporary transport/logistics management solution provider with core competence in the provision of short term car rental and long term car leasing solutions. We have developed competence and generated a degree of pedigree in the provision of short / long term car hire services, driver management services and fleet management services.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Logistics Manager

Job Location:&nbsp;Airport Road, Ajao Estate - Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

About the Role


	GKT Consults Limited is seeking a highly experienced and disciplined Logistics Manager to take full responsibility for managing our fleet operations, driver workforce, and key external service partners.
	This is a hands-on role that requires strong operational control, sound judgment, and the ability to deliver consistent results across both internal teams and external stakeholders.
	The ideal candidate must be proactive, accountable, and capable of managing time-sensitive operations with minimal supervision.


Key Responsibilities


	Oversee daily fleet operations and ensure optimal vehicle utilization.
	Manage, supervise, and enforce discipline among drivers.
	Ensure strict adherence to schedules, especially for time-sensitive assignments.
	Implement and enforce standards for driver appearance, conduct, and professionalism.
	Monitor vehicle condition and coordinate preventive and corrective maintenance.
	Build and manage relationships with external stakeholders including maintenance vendors, third-party logistics providers, and service partners.
	Ensure external vendors meet agreed service standards, timelines, and quality expectations.
	Negotiate and manage service agreements to ensure value and reliability.
	Proactively identify and resolve operational issues across both internal and external teams.
	Coordinate with internal teams to ensure seamless service delivery.
	Maintain accurate records of operations, vendor performance, incidents, and compliance.
	Maintain and monitor safety and security procedures of fleet.


Requirements


	5&ndash;8 years of experience in logistics, transport, or fleet management.
	Proven experience managing drivers, operational teams, and third-party vendors.
	Strong leadership, negotiation, and stakeholder management skills.
	Demonstrated ability to hold vendors and partners accountable for results.
	High level of discipline, accountability, and attention to detail.
	Ability to work under pressure and manage time-sensitive operations.
	Willingness to be available as required to ensure operational efficiency.
	Strong communication and reporting skills.


Key Attributes:


	Takes ownership and delivers measurable results.
	Firm but fair in managing people and partners.
	Proactive and solution-driven.
	Highly organized and dependable.
	Strong sense of responsibility and urgency.


What We Are Looking For:


	We are looking for a seasoned professional who understands that this role carries significant responsibility.
	The ability to enforce standards, manage relationships, and consistently deliver results across both internal operations and external partners is essential.


Salary
N450,000 - N600,000 monthly.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;gktbusiness@gmail.com&nbsp;using &quot;Logistics Manager Application&quot; as the subject of the mail.",

Logistics Manager Job at GKT Car Rentals




        
    

        
        GKT Car Rentals is a contemporary transport/logistics management solution provider with core competence in the provision of short term car rental and long term car leasing solutions. We have developed competence and generated a degree of pedigree in the provision of short / long term car hire services, driver management services and fleet management services.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Logistics Manager

Job Location: Airport Road, Ajao Estate - Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

About the Role
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	GKT Consults Limited is seeking a highly experienced and disciplined Logistics Manager to take full responsibility for managing our fleet operations, driver workforce, and key external service partners.
	This is a hands-on role that requires strong operational control, sound judgment, and the ability to deliver consistent results across both internal teams and external stakeholders.
	The ideal candidate must be proactive, accountable, and capable of managing time-sensitive operations with minimal supervision.


Key Responsibilities


	Oversee daily fleet operations and ensure optimal vehicle utilization.
	Manage, supervise, and enforce discipline among drivers.
	Ensure strict adherence to schedules, especially for time-sensitive assignments.
	Implement and enforce standards for driver appearance, conduct, and professionalism.
	Monitor vehicle condition and coordinate preventive and corrective maintenance.
	Build and manage relationships with external stakeholders including maintenance vendors, third-party logistics providers, and service partners.
	Ensure external vendors meet agreed service standards, timelines, and quality expectations.
	Negotiate and manage service agreements to ensure value and reliability.
	Proactively identify and resolve operational issues across both internal and external teams.
	Coordinate with internal teams to ensure seamless service delivery.
	Maintain accurate records of operations, vendor performance, incidents, and compliance.
	Maintain and monitor safety and security procedures of fleet.


Requirements


	5–8 years of experience in logistics, transport, or fleet management.
	Proven experience managing drivers, operational teams, and third-party vendors.
	Strong leadership, negotiation, and stakeholder management skills.
	Demonstrated ability to hold vendors and partners accountable for results.
	High level of discipline, accountability, and attention to detail.
	Ability to work under pressure and manage time-sensitive operations.
	Willingness to be available as required to ensure operational efficiency.
	Strong communication and reporting skills.


Key Attributes:


	Takes ownership and delivers measurable results.
	Firm but fair in managing people and partners.
	Proactive and solution-driven.
	Highly organized and dependable.
	Strong sense of responsibility and urgency.


What We Are Looking For:


	We are looking for a seasoned professional who understands that this role carries significant responsibility.
	The ability to enforce standards, manage relationships, and consistently deliver results across both internal operations and external partners is essential.


Salary
N450,000 - N600,000 monthly.

Method of Application 
Interested candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using "Logistics Manager Application" as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply
